zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Greene於1410年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes18歲，母親Mrs. Walter de Grene19歲。他於1435年與Elizabeth Warner在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布利其諾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1495年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可拉維利享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Greene于1410年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes18岁，母亲Mrs. Walter de Grene19岁。他于1435年与Elizabeth Warner在英国英格兰史洛普爾布利其諾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1495年在英国英格兰史洛普爾可拉維利享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Greene was born in 1410, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes, was 18 and his mother, Mrs. Walter de Grene, was 19. He married Elizabeth Warner in 1435, in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1495, in Claverley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Greene est né en 1410, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Walter de Grene, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Warner en 1435, à Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1495, à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Greene 1410 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes 18 und seine Mutter Mrs. Walter de Grene 19. Er hat 1435 in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Warner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1495 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Claverley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Greene è nato il nel 1410 nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Walter de Grene, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Warner nel 1435, nel Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1495, nel Claverley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Greeneが1410年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Walter de Grene of Hayesは18歳，母Mrs. Walter de Greneは19歳であった。1435年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノースでElizabeth Warnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1495年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Greene(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Walter de Grene(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 브리지노르스에서 Elizabeth Warner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Greene nasceu em 1410, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Walter de Grene, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Warner em 1435, em Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1495, em Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Greene родился в 1410 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Walter de Grene, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Warner в 1435 г. в местности бриджнорт, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1495 г. в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Greene nació en 1410, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mrs. Walter de Grene, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Warner en 1435, en Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1495, en Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años.
